channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: NetEase is reportedly pulling funding for Yakuza creator's studio
item.description: The hype for Gang of Dragon, the debut game from Nagoshi Studio, may already be getting derailed. According to a Bloomberg report, Chinese tech giant NetEase is going to stop financing Nagoshi Studio starting in May. Bloomberg confirmed the news with the studio's employees and a NetEase spokesperson. The report explained that NetEase decided to cut funding to Nagoshi Studio, which was founded in 2021 by Yakuza franchise creator Toshihiro Nagoshi, after finding out the studio needed $44.4 million to complete the project. Bloomberg reported that Nagoshi Studio is trying to find new sponsors but ...

item.title: Here are 11 TV deals for watching March Madness that I recommend — $1,300 off 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs
item.description: I'm rounding up today's 11 best TV deals that I recommend for watching March Madness, including record-low prices on best-rated 4K, QLED, and OLED TVs.

item.title: My 8-year-old daughter was struggling with math until we discovered this app
item.description: Homescreen Heroes: Duolingo Math teaches up to grade 8 math in a fun and engaging way

item.title: Apple is going high-end with new ‘Ultra’ products next
item.description: Fresh off launching the low-cost MacBook Neo, Apple is reportedly preparing at least three new products that will fit into its highest-end "ultra" lineup. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gruman, the next batch of releases may not bear the "ultra" name, like its Watch, but will all command price premiums over their mainline counterparts. There's the […]...

item.title: 'Nothing has actually changed': Valve recommits to a 2026 launch for the Steam Machine amid rumors of a further delay
item.description: A blog post from Valve itself sparked concerns that the Steam Machine would be pushed back to 2027.

item.title: Dynamic UI for dynamic AI: Inside the emerging A2UI model
item.description: With agentic AI, businesses are conducting business more dynamically. Instead of traditional pre-programmed bots and static rules, agents can now “think” and invent alternate paths when unseen conditions arise. For instance, using a business domain ontology like FIBO (financial industry business ontology) can help keep agents within guardrails and avoid unwanted behavior. The bottleneck is now in the user experience (UX) layer. While agents are dynamic and transform with the data drift guided by ontology, the user interface is still very much static. These experiences with fixed fields and con...

item.title: Honor Magic 8 Pro vs Honor Magic 7 Pro : comment choisir le meilleur smartphone haut de gamme Honor ?
item.description: Après avoir surpris son monde avec l'excellent modèle Magic 8 Lite, voyons comment se défend le Magic 8 Pro face à son incroyable prédécesseur. Pourra-t-il lui piquer la couronne ? Étudions ça dans notre nouveau comparatif.

item.title: Report Says More High-End ‘Ultra’ Apple Products Are On Their Way
item.description: Apple's wallet-friendly era will be short-lived, reporting suggests.

item.title: Yet another state makes moves to end dynamic pricing
item.description: A new bill in Pennsylvania is set to prohibit dynamic pricing. It's just the latest.
